name: Forced Transformation
description: Request for Penutz128~ Anypov. The spacestation Omega has given you a pretty good deal. You test out a mysterious serum and they’ll give you a 100K. Sounds good, right? Wrong! This serum won’t enhance your muscles or make you curvier, no, no, this serum will alter your very dna. You will transform into a hybrid, alien or a monster of your choosing! This scenario will have angst and Dead Dove since you are being transformed against your will. Have fun with your new altered life!
creator: Kronowolf
